mapper.sql: id, code, workspace_id, dir_id, name, task_type, content, source_type, params, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at
mapper.select: select from t_r_script where code = #{code} limit 1

select from t_r_script where code in
#{code}
select from t_r_script where dir_id = #{dirId} and source_type = 'IDE'
select from t_r_script where workspace_id = #{workspaceId} and source_type = 'IDE'

select count(*) from t_r_script where workspace_id in
#{id}
